## koem-cli get reserves clear

Clear all reserves and free their ports

### Synopsis

Release all reserved ports and remove reservations. Use -l to target a specific label.

```
koem-cli get reserves clear [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for clear
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -l, --label string   Label name
```
